title: CloseQuartersConcoctions
description: Lets you smash bottles on other players
body:
splash potions can be iffy to use. sometimes you miss your target, sometimes you hit something extra. that's where close quarters concoctions comes in! with this mod you can now directly smash a potion over an entity's head :)

[video](https://youtu.be/GECnL0mgbyU)
